domain: Publication-status lifecycle for a retracted conservation-genetics finding

real_event.as_published_status: the 2024 article presented the finding as citable
real_event.current_status: the 2025 retraction means the finding should be declined as current evidence

selection_method: Body-0 reuses the impersonal rw-0001 publication lifecycle already world-checked by M2. The two facts separate the original-filing residence block from the current-status recurrence without changing the retraction corpus that authorizes the M2 mint.
corpus_scope: Original-versus-current citation status of one retracted freshwater-fish epigenetic-clock finding
